Localization.Description: Operations with a virtual machine group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} removed a virtual machine group on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not remove a virtual machine group on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not create a virtual machine group on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} created virtual machine group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
